tasks.title: Harden worktree fallback branch creation against branch-name collisions
tasks.details: WorktreeManager.create() falls back to `git worktree add -b factory/<base>/<taskId>` when base branch is already checked out. If the same taskId is retried or reused, branch creation can fail with 'branch already exists'. Add collision handling (e.g., existence check + suffixing or -B strategy with safeguards) and tests for repeated task retries.

tasks.title: Prevent cleanup failures from masking task outcomes
tasks.details: completeTask() and failTask() call worktreeManager.remove() without guarding cleanup errors. If cleanup fails (already removed, lock, path issue), it can throw and obscure the real execution/validation result. Wrap cleanup in try/catch, preserve original task result, and emit structured warning telemetry.

tasks.title: Tighten cross-repo failure normalization
tasks.details: _processCrossRepoTask() currently records null repo results as `{status: 'pending'}` which is treated as partial later. Normalize null/empty results to explicit failed status + error reason so reports and stop conditions remain deterministic.

tasks.title: Expand direct unit coverage for core orchestrator primitives
tasks.details: Add focused tests for src/code-executor.js, src/task-manager.js, src/push-pr-manager.js, src/metrics-writer.js, and src/critic-gate.js edge cases. Current suite passes and covers flows, but these modules have limited direct-edge coverage (timeouts, malformed persisted JSONL, empty commit states, gate override behavior).

tasks.title: Refactor CLI option parsing and numeric coercion
tasks.details: parseArgs() uses manual parsing and downstream `||` fallbacks, which can blur intentional zero/false-like values and make validation brittle. Refactor to centralized option schema with explicit integer validation and nullish coalescing for deterministic defaults.

tasks.title: Fix cross-repo status derivation to respect failed results
tasks.details: _processCrossRepoTask() computes final status using `r.status === 'completed'`, but repo results from factory.processNext() often omit `status` and only set `failed: true`. This can misclassify successful or failed tasks as `partial`. Normalize each repo result before aggregation and treat explicit `failed`/`error` as failure deterministically.

tasks.title: Add regression tests for cross-repo normalization and aggregate status
tasks.details: Add tests where factory.processNext() returns (a) completed result without status, (b) failed result with failed:true and no status, and (c) null result. Assert _processCrossRepoTask() output status and per-repo normalization are deterministic and do not rely on missing status fields.

tasks.title: Make task intake IDs deterministic under parallel submissions
tasks.details: submitCrossRepoTask() uses Date.now()+Math.random() for IDs. Replace with uuid-based IDs (already used elsewhere) to avoid collision risk, improve traceability, and simplify log correlation across retries and distributed runners.

tasks.title: Extract safe worktree cleanup helper for complete/fail paths
tasks.details: completeTask() and failTask() duplicate cleanup and metrics scaffolding. Extract a shared helper that performs guarded worktree cleanup and common metric envelope creation, reducing drift and ensuring future reliability fixes apply consistently to both paths.

tasks.title: Harden CLI numeric flags to preserve explicit zero values
tasks.details: watch-mode options currently use `args.value || config.value || default`, which drops valid parsed zeros and makes behavior implicit. Switch to explicit finite-number validation and nullish-coalescing (`??`) so `0` and invalid numbers are handled deterministically with clear errors.

tasks.title: Add tests for CLI flag coercion and invalid numeric input
tasks.details: Add cases for `--interval`, `--retry-budget`, `--max-tasks`, and `--max-polls` covering explicit zero, negative, NaN, and omitted values. Assert deterministic fallback/error behavior and prevent regressions in watch-mode runtime limits.

tasks.title: Bound in-memory processed-issue set for long-running watchers
tasks.details: IssueWatcher stores processed issue numbers in an unbounded Set for the process lifetime. Add bounded retention (LRU or TTL window) and a focused test to prevent memory growth during long daemon runs on high-volume repos.

tasks.title: Guard TaskManager load against malformed/empty queue lines
tasks.details:
TaskManager.loadQueue() does `content.trim().split('
')`; whitespace-only files still create parse-attempt noise and malformed lines only log errors. Add early return for blank content, structured parse warnings, and tests for truncated JSONL recovery to avoid noisy startup and partial-state ambiguity.

tasks.title: Validate MetricsWriter payload before record() persists
tasks.details: MetricsWriter.record() assumes `task` and `startTime` are present; missing/invalid values produce NaN/invalid durations and potentially misleading metrics. Add input validation + sane defaults and tests for undefined task/startTime to keep stats trustworthy.

tasks.title: Add focused tests for TaskManager persistence edge cases
tasks.details: Add direct unit tests for TaskManager covering duplicate IDs, stale queue entries, malformed JSONL lines, and load/save idempotence under restart. Current integration paths pass but these persistence edge cases are under-tested.

tasks.title: Quote/sanitize shell arguments in PushPRManager git/gh commands
tasks.details: PushPRManager builds shell commands with string interpolation (`git -C ${wt.path} ...`, `gh pr create --title "${prTitle}" ...`). Task titles, repo strings, and paths can contain shell-sensitive characters and break commands or enable injection. Replace with execFile/spawn argv usage and add tests for quotes/newlines/special chars in title/repo/path.

tasks.title: Escape markdown fields in CriticGate-generated PR body
tasks.details: generatePRBody() embeds raw task title/description/errors into markdown. Special sequences/backticks can break formatting and make review output hard to parse. Add lightweight markdown escaping/truncation for untrusted text fields and coverage tests for multiline/error-heavy payloads.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for PushPRManager command construction
tasks.details: Add tests that mock command execution to assert branch detection, push, and PR-creation command args are correctly formed and safe. Include force mode + disabled push paths to ensure deterministic errors and no accidental external side effects.

tasks.title: Sanitize shell invocation in CodeExecutor stage/remediation commands
tasks.details: CodeExecutor uses shell strings like `cd ${worktreePath} && ...` and interpolates remediation commands directly. Replace with execFile/spawn argv or validated wrappers to avoid shell injection/escaping bugs from paths and generated commands. Add tests for spaces/quotes/special chars in worktree paths.

tasks.title: Make test command strategy project-aware (avoid hardcoded --run flag)
tasks.details: runTests() always executes `npm test -- --run`, which is runner-specific and can fail on repositories that do not support that argument. Add configurable/default test command resolution per repo and fallback behavior, with tests covering incompatible test runners.

tasks.title: Harden AgentRunner binary availability checks and preset model config
tasks.details: AgentRunner.isAvailable() uses `which ${bin}` shell execution and codex preset hardcodes `-m o4-mini`. Replace availability checks with non-shell resolution, make model configurable via options/env, and add tests for customBin edge cases and deterministic preset args.
